title: Latent-bug sweep (REQ-H4)
description: Fix verified defects (split into small commits if needed): (1) autonomous-launcher.sh ~L123-125 EXIT_CODE=$? captures tee not the agent after a pipe. (2) agents/cycles/daily-review.mjs OpenSpec-Hygiene/Model-Health blocks (~L322-349) use fs./path. namespaces but only named members are imported -> ReferenceError; fix the imports. (3) logCapabilityUsage called with an object in garden-roadmap.mjs + alignment-monitor.mjs -> use the positional signature. (4) add __isMainModule guards to ast-analyzer, version-snapshot, migrate-memory, rem-sleep, garden-roadmap, alignment-monitor. (5) semantic-index.mjs: pass payload via stdin (E2BIG-safe, like the shipped rag-indexer fix) + implement the real JS cosine fallback (currently return null). Spec: REQ-H4. Add/keep tests passing.
